Headline: Eastbound #79 79th and Southbound #54B South Cicero Temporary Reroute near Ford City Mall
ShortDescription: Eastbound #79 79th and Southbound #54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted due to police activity near Ford City Mall.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #79 79th and Southbound #54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted due to police activity near Ford City Mall.

Eastbound #79 79th buses will operate via departing terminal, Kostner, 76th, Pulaski, 79th and over normal route.

Southbound #54B South Cicero buses will operate via Cicero, 72nd, Kostner, 76th and into terminal.

Allow extra travel time.
